data.title: Advanced DDoS Protection
data.description: Protects against Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) attacks.
data.technical_spec: Uses AI-driven measures to detect and mitigate traffic anomalies.

data.title: Transport Layer Security (TLS)
data.description: Secures data in transit with encryption.
data.technical_spec: Implements TLS 1.3 with strong cipher suites.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Adds an extra layer to verify user identity.
data.technical_spec: Supports SMS, app-based, and hardware authentication methods.

data.title: Continuous Monitoring
data.description: Constantly monitors systems for potential threats.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates AI and machine learning for real-time threat detection.

data.title: Data Encryption at Rest
data.description: Secures data stored on servers against unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Employs AES-256 encryption for all stored data.
